name: Schaden
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Schaden (Claims) documents.

This L0 covers all claim-related documents: first notifications, assessments, expert reports, and settlement letters.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- Claim reference numbers (SCH-, CLM-, FNOL-)
- "Schadenmeldung", "Schadenanzeige", "Schadennummer"
- Loss date, incident description, policyholder details
- Third-party information and witness statements

categories.name: Schadenmeldung
categories.prompt:
Classify first notification of loss (FNOL) documents.

Look for:
- "Schadenmeldung", "Schadenanzeige", "Erstmeldung"
- Incident date, time, and location
- Policyholder signature and date of submission
- Claim reference number (SCH-, FNOL-)

types.name: FNOL Formular
types.prompt: Structured first notification of loss form. Contains policyholder details, incident date/time/location, description of loss, and claim number.

types.name: Zeugenaussage
types.prompt: Witness statement accompanying a claim. Contains witness name, contact details, and account of the incident.

categories.name: Schadenprüfung
categories.prompt:
Classify claim assessment and investigation documents.

Look for:
- Adjuster or expert report letterhead
- Assessment date and reference to claim number
- Coverage decision language ("gedeckt", "abgelehnt")
- Itemised damage list with cost estimates

types.name: Schadengutachten
types.prompt: Expert damage assessment report. Contains adjuster name, inspection date, itemised damage, and repair cost estimate.

types.name: Fotodokumentation
types.prompt: Photo documentation of damage. Usually a PDF with images, captions, and claim reference.

categories.name: Schadenabschluss
categories.prompt:
Classify claim settlement and closure documents.

Look for:
- "Abfindungserklärung", "Schadenabschluss", "Entschädigungszahlung"
- Payment amount and bank details
- Claimant signature confirming settlement
- Closure date and claim reference

name: Sach
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Sach (Property) documents.

This L0 covers property insurance documents: claims, policies, surveys, and repair invoices.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- Property address (street, city, postcode)
- Policy numbers starting with "SAC-" or "PHH-"
- "Gebäudeversicherung", "Hausratversicherung", "Sachversicherung"
- Building survey or valuation reference numbers

versions.note: Improved property survey and claim accuracy.

categories.name: Sachschaden
categories.prompt:
Classify property damage claim documents.

Look for:
- "Sachschaden", "Gebäudeschaden", "Wasserschaden", "Feuerschaden"
- Property address and description of damage
- Photos or survey report reference
- Repair cost estimate or contractor quote

types.name: Wasserschaden
types.prompt: Water damage claim document. Contains source of water ingress, affected rooms, drying/repair estimate, and claim reference.

types.name: Feuerschaden
types.prompt: Fire damage claim. Contains fire brigade report reference, extent of damage, and salvage details.

types.name: Einbruchschaden
types.prompt: Burglary/break-in damage claim. Contains police report number, list of stolen/damaged items, and entry point description.

categories.name: Sachgutachten
categories.prompt:
Classify property survey and valuation reports.

Look for:
- Surveyor credentials and accreditation
- Property address and full description
- Rebuild cost or market value figure
- Survey date and reference number

types.name: Bewertungsbericht
types.prompt: Property valuation report for underwriting. Contains rebuild cost, market value, construction type, and risk assessment.

types.name: Vermieterobjekt
types.prompt: Landlord/rented property policy or survey. Contains "Vermieter" or "vermietetes Objekt" language, rental income references.

categories.name: Sachpolice
categories.prompt:
Classify property insurance policy documents.

Look for:
- "Versicherungsschein", "Police", policy number (SAC-, PHH-)
- Insured property address
- Sum insured and premium details
- Policy period start and end dates

types.name: Wohngebäude
types.prompt: Residential building (Wohngebäude) policy. Contains building sum insured, postcode, construction year, and cover type.

types.name: Hausrat
types.prompt: Household contents (Hausrat) policy. Contains contents sum insured, insured address, and listed valuables.

name: Kraft
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Kraft (Motor) documents.

This L0 covers motor insurance: claims, policies, quotations, and legal documentation.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- Vehicle registration numbers, chassis/VIN numbers
- Policy numbers starting with "KFZ-" or "KRA-"
- "Kraftfahrzeugversicherung", "Kfz-Haftpflicht", "Vollkasko"
- Garage/repairer letterheads and approval numbers
- FNOL reference numbers (SCH-, FNOL-)

versions.note: Improved FNOL and repair invoice accuracy.
Added inspection classifier, expanded complaint sub-types.

categories.name: Kraft Schaden
categories.prompt:
Classify Kraft (Motor) claim documents.

Look for:
- Vehicle registration number and make/model
- Incident date and location
- Third-party details and police report reference
- FNOL or claim reference (SCH-, KFZ-)

types.name: FNOL Formular
types.prompt: Motor first notification of loss. Contains vehicle details, incident description, third-party information, and claim reference.

types.name: Reparaturrechnung
types.prompt: Garage repair invoice for motor claim. Contains garage name, vehicle registration, itemised repair costs, and parts list.

types.name: Polizeibericht
types.prompt: Police report for motor incident. Contains crime/accident reference number, officer details, and incident summary.

categories.name: Einfach Beschwerde
categories.prompt:
Classify standard complaint documents for Kraft (Motor).

Look for:
- Customer dissatisfaction language
- Reference to policy or claim number
- Escalation language (ombudsman, regulator)

types.name: Standard Beschwerde
types.prompt: Standard customer complaint letter. Contains complaint description, policy reference, and desired resolution.

types.name: Vorstand Beschwerde
types.prompt: Board-level escalated complaint. Addressed to Vorstand/management, high urgency language, regulatory references.

categories.name: Kraft Versicherungsschein
categories.prompt:
Classify Kraft (Motor) policy documents.

Look for:
- "Versicherungsschein", "Kraftfahrzeugschein"
- Vehicle registration, make, model, and year
- Policy number (KFZ-, KRA-)
- Cover type: Haftpflicht, Teilkasko, Vollkasko

types.name: Kfz-Haftpflicht
types.prompt: Motor third-party liability policy. Contains vehicle details, coverage limits, and "Haftpflicht" designation.

types.name: Vollkasko
types.prompt: Comprehensive motor policy. Contains "Vollkasko" coverage, vehicle value, and excess/deductible details.

categories.name: Rechnung
categories.prompt:
Classify invoices related to Kraft (Motor) insurance.

Look for:
- Garage or supplier letterhead
- VAT number and invoice number
- Itemised parts and labour costs
- Vehicle registration number

types.name: Werkstattrechnung
types.prompt: Workshop/garage invoice. Contains labour hours, parts list, VAT breakdown, and vehicle registration.

name: Rechnung
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Rechnung (Invoice) documents.

This L0 covers all invoice and billing documents submitted across insurance lines.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- "Rechnung", "Faktura", "Invoice"
- Invoice number and date
- VAT number (Steuernummer / USt-IdNr.)
- Supplier/vendor name and address
- Itemised services or goods with amounts

categories.name: Reparaturrechnung
categories.prompt:
Classify repair invoices.

Look for:
- Workshop or contractor letterhead
- Itemised labour and parts
- Vehicle registration or property address reference
- Claim or job reference number

types.name: Kfz-Reparatur
types.prompt: Motor vehicle repair invoice. Contains vehicle registration, garage details, parts list, and labour charges.

types.name: Gebäudereparatur
types.prompt: Building repair invoice. Contains property address, contractor details, scope of works, and total cost.

categories.name: Gutachterrechnung
categories.prompt:
Classify expert/assessor invoices.

Look for:
- Expert or assessor firm letterhead
- Reference to inspection or report number
- Assessment fee and travel expenses
- Claim reference number

types.name: Sachverständigenrechnung
types.prompt: Independent expert invoice. Contains assessor accreditation, inspection date, fee schedule, and report reference.

categories.name: Anwaltsrechnung
categories.prompt:
Classify legal/solicitor invoices.

Look for:
- Law firm letterhead with "Rechtsanwalt" or "Kanzlei"
- Hourly rate and billable hours
- Case or file reference number
- RVG (Rechtsanwaltsvergütungsgesetz) fee references

name: Einfach
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Einfach (Simple/Standard) documents.

This L0 covers routine, low-complexity documents: standard letters, acknowledgements, and simple requests.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- Simple one-page correspondence
- Standard acknowledgement language ("Bestätigung", "Eingangsbestätigung")
- No complex claim or legal content
- Routine policyholder enquiries

categories.name: Einfach Beschwerde
categories.prompt:
Classify standard (simple) complaint letters.

Look for:
- Routine dissatisfaction language
- Single issue complaint (delay, communication)
- No regulatory escalation language
- Policy or claim number reference

types.name: Standardbeschwerde
types.prompt: Standard complaint with single issue. Contains policyholder name, policy number, complaint description, and desired outcome.

categories.name: Standardanfrage
categories.prompt:
Classify standard policyholder enquiry letters.

Look for:
- Question or information request tone
- Policy or claim number reference
- No urgency or legal language
- Routine topics: address change, coverage query, payment query

types.name: Adressänderung
types.prompt: Address change request. Contains current and new address, policy number, and policyholder signature.

types.name: Auskunftsanfrage
types.prompt: Information request about policy or claim status. Contains policy/claim reference and specific question.

name: Vorstand
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Vorstand (Board-level) documents.

This L0 covers escalated, board-level correspondence: senior complaints, regulatory escalations, and management decisions.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- Addressed to "Vorstand", "Geschäftsführung", "Management"
- Regulatory body references (BaFin, Ombudsmann)
- High-urgency or legal threat language
- Senior signatory on both sender and recipient side

categories.name: Vorstand Beschwerde
categories.prompt:
Classify board-level escalated complaint documents.

Look for:
- Addressed to Vorstand or Geschäftsführung
- Prior complaint reference (already escalated once)
- Ombudsmann or BaFin reference
- Legal threat or litigation language

types.name: BaFin-Beschwerde
types.prompt: Complaint referencing or copied to BaFin (German financial regulator). Contains BaFin reference, escalation history, and regulatory language.

types.name: Ombudsmann-Beschwerde
types.prompt: Complaint submitted to or via the insurance ombudsman (Ombudsmann). Contains case number and ombudsman letterhead.

categories.name: Vorstandsentscheidung
categories.prompt:
Classify board-level decision and approval documents.

Look for:
- Internal memo or board minute format
- Decision language ("beschlossen", "genehmigt")
- Board member signatures
- Reference to policy or claim case

name: Vertragsänderung
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Vertragsänderung (Policy Change) documents.

This L0 covers all mid-term policy amendments: coverage changes, vehicle/property updates, and endorsements.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- "Vertragsänderung", "Nachtrag", "Endorsement", "Änderungsantrag"
- Policy number and effective date of change
- Description of what is being changed (old vs new value)
- Policyholder signature and date

categories.name: Änderungsantrag
categories.prompt:
Classify policy change request documents.

Look for:
- "Änderungsantrag", "Antrag auf Vertragsänderung"
- Current policy details and requested change
- Effective date of requested change
- Policyholder signature

types.name: Fahrzeugwechsel
types.prompt: Vehicle substitution request. Contains old and new vehicle registration, make/model, and requested effective date.

types.name: Deckungsänderung
types.prompt: Coverage change request. Contains current cover level, requested new level (e.g. Haftpflicht → Vollkasko), and reason.

types.name: Adress-/Risikoänderung
types.prompt: Change of insured address or risk location. Contains old and new address, postcode, and effective date.

categories.name: Änderungsbestätigung
categories.prompt:
Classify policy change confirmation documents (endorsements).

Look for:
- "Nachtrag", "Änderungsbestätigung", endorsement number
- Updated policy schedule reflecting the change
- Insurer stamp or digital signature
- Revised premium (if applicable)

types.name: Nachtrag
types.prompt: Policy endorsement / mid-term adjustment confirmation. Contains endorsement number, changed fields, and updated premium.

name: Privatschutz
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Privatschutz (Private Coverage) documents.

This L0 covers personal lines private insurance: household, personal liability, legal protection, and life cover.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- "Privathaftpflicht", "Hausrat", "Rechtsschutz", "Lebensversicherung"
- Individual policyholder name and home address
- Policy numbers starting with "PRI-" or "PRV-"
- Personal risk details (family size, property type)

categories.name: Privathaftpflicht
categories.prompt:
Classify private liability insurance documents.

Look for:
- "Privathaftpflicht", "PHV"
- Individual or family policyholder details
- Liability limit and deductible
- Covered persons (family members, pets)

types.name: Einzelperson
types.prompt: Private liability policy for a single person. Contains individual name, address, and single-person premium.

types.name: Familientarif
types.prompt: Family private liability policy. Contains policyholder and listed family members, family premium rate.

categories.name: Rechtsschutz
categories.prompt:
Classify legal protection insurance documents.

Look for:
- "Rechtsschutzversicherung", "RSV"
- Legal area covered (Arbeitsrecht, Mietrecht, Verkehrsrecht)
- Waiting period clause references
- Law firm panel or free choice of lawyer clause

types.name: Arbeitsrechtsschutz
types.prompt: Employment law protection policy. Contains "Arbeitsrecht" cover, employment status of insured, and waiting period.

types.name: Mietrechtsschutz
types.prompt: Tenancy law protection policy. Contains "Mietrecht" cover, rental address, and tenant/landlord role.

categories.name: Hausrat
categories.prompt:
Classify household contents insurance documents.

Look for:
- "Hausratversicherung", "Hausrat"
- Insured address and sum insured for contents
- Listed high-value items (Wertsachen)
- Burglary, fire, and water damage cover sections

name: Kündigung
lobPrompt:
You are classifying Kündigung (Cancellation) documents.

This L0 covers all policy cancellation and termination documents from both policyholder and insurer side.

{{CLASSIFICATION_HIERARCHY}}

Key identifiers:
- "Kündigung", "Vertragsauflösung", "Kündigung zum nächstmöglichen Termin"
- Policy number and cancellation effective date
- Reason for cancellation (optional)
- Registered letter (Einschreiben) references

categories.name: Versicherungsnehmer-Kündigung
categories.prompt:
Classify cancellation letters sent BY the policyholder.

Look for:
- Policyholder as sender
- "Ich kündige", "hiermit kündige ich"
- Policy number and requested cancellation date
- Reason: premium increase, found better cover, no longer needed

types.name: Ordentliche Kündigung
types.prompt: Standard annual cancellation at policy renewal date. Contains policy number, renewal date, and policyholder signature.

types.name: Sonderkündigung
types.prompt: Special cancellation right triggered by premium increase or claim. Contains trigger event reference and cancellation date.

categories.name: Versicherer-Kündigung
categories.prompt:
Classify cancellation notices sent BY the insurer.

Look for:
- Insurer letterhead as sender
- "Wir kündigen", "Kündigung des Versicherungsvertrages"
- Reason: non-payment, fraud, risk change
- Notice period stated

types.name: Kündigung wegen Nichtzahlung
types.prompt: Insurer cancellation due to non-payment of premium. Contains outstanding amount, reminder references, and final cancellation date.

types.name: Kündigung wegen Obliegenheitsverletzung
types.prompt: Insurer cancellation due to breach of duty or misrepresentation. Contains reason statement and legal basis.

categories.name: Kündigungsbestätigung
categories.prompt:
Classify cancellation confirmation documents.

Look for:
- "Kündigungsbestätigung", "Wir bestätigen die Kündigung"
- Policy number and confirmed cancellation date
- Pro-rata refund amount (if applicable)
- Insurer stamp or digital signature
